data.title: U.S. February PMI Data Shows Mixed Economic Signals
data.description: According to PANews, the preliminary data for the U.S. February S&P Global Manufacturing PMI reached 51.6, marking an eight-month high. In contrast, the S&P Global Services PMI for February recorded a preliminary value of 49.7, the lowest in 25 months. Additionally, the S&P Global Composite PMI for February was reported at 50.4, hitting a 17-month low. Following these reports, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a brief decline of over ten points, currently standing at 106.46.

data.title: Solana: Interest-bearing stablecoin coming soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana published a statement on the X platform stating that it will soon launch an interest-bearing stablecoin that is not locked and can be used safely on the chain.

data.title: Sora Ventures announces MicroStrategy 2.0 Bitcoin yield strategy for Asia
data.description:
Today, at Consensus Hong Kong, Jason Fang announced the MicroStrategy 2.0 framework for Asia. The framework leverages structured products to generate Bitcoin yield, allowing retail investors to enhance performance without the need for private key management. Per Sora Ventures, Fang’s remarks underlined a strategic effort to translate institutional-style Bitcoin treasury management into a model...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/sora-ventures-announces-microstrategy-2-0-bitcoin-yield-strategy-for-asia/

data.title: Investment Giant Franklin Templeton Launches Mixed Bitcoin and Ethereum Exchange-Traded Fund
data.description:
The financial services giant Franklin Templeton has launched a mixed Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) spot exchange-traded fund (ETF). Coinbase will provide custody services for the new Franklin Crypto Index ETF (EZPZ), the firm’s third crypto exchange-traded fund. Franklin Templeton also launched single-asset Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs last year. The new fund will track the […]
The post...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/investment-giant-franklin-templeton-launches-mixed-bitcoin-and-ethereum-exchange-traded-fund/

data.title: Coinbase scores major win as SEC set to drop lawsuit
data.description:
Coinbase says the SEC has agreed to dismiss its lawsuit against the US-based crypto exchange. The SEC sued Coinbase in 2023 but with Gary Gensler’s exit, the regulator is eyeing better regulatory approach. US-based crypto exchange Coinbase is set for a landmark development after the Securities and Exchange Commission reportedly agreed to dismiss its own […]
The post Coinbase scores major win...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/coinbase-scores-major-win-as-sec-set-to-drop-lawsuit/

data.title: U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Proposed to Offset National Debt
data.description:
According to PANews, Matthew Sigel, Head of Digital Asset Research at VanEck Research, suggested on the X platform that a U.S. strategic Bitcoin reserve could help mitigate national debt. The organization has modeled this concept and released a tool on their website.

In response, Cynthia Lummis, Chair of the U.S. Senate Banking Subcommittee on Digital Assets, expressed support for the tool, describing it as innovative and worth promoting. She emphasized that Bitcoin could address the issue of reducing national debt.
